author: AdrianoDee
body:
#### PR description:

This PR proposes a fix for the failures reported in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51199#issuecomment-4716633287. It disables the recycling of GEN-SIM inputs for pre-Run4 wfs.

#### PR validation:

Would let the bot test `10001.0` (e.g.).
title: Disabling GEN-SIM recycling for pre Run4 wfs
